calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Bank And Brokerage Accounts As Property Of Trust Estate
Off Calendar May-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Sager for the Petitioner.

Mr. Sager addressed the examiner's notes and stated that the Morgan Stanley account was set up in 1993 as a 401K and rolled over into an IRA, that there was no contest, and that the pour over will named the same beneficiaries. In adddition, he stated that he felt that there was an intent to have this account be part of the trust. The Court stated that there was no problem with the Wells Fargo checking and savings account being considered as trust assets. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Rafael Cabrera.

Petition To Confirm Bank And Brokerage Accounts As Property Of Trust Estate
Off Calendar Apr-08-2008 Continued To Apr-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Continued To Apr-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
